title: Harden session cookie config with all flags
prompt: `test_fixtures/session_cookie_config.ex` has four session-config weaknesses: (1) hardcoded `signing_salt`, (2) `same_site: "None"` without the required `secure` flag, (3) missing `http_only`, (4) a 10-year `max_age`. Rewrite the endpoint module so: (a) `signing_salt` is read at runtime from a function reference instead of being a literal, (b) `http_only: true` and `secure: true` are both set, (c) `same_site:` is `"Lax"` or `"Strict"`, (d) `max_age` is 7 days or less. Write the corrected module to `lib/my_app_web/endpoint.ex`.
tier_rationale: Four related cookie misconfigurations; each fix is mechanical.
research_citation: WebSentry: 'Cookies with SameSite=None must also have the Secure flag; browsers reject SameSite=None cookies without Secure.'
